# Alembic Migrations

The initial revision (`0001_initial`) builds the entire schema from the
SQLAlchemy metadata so it always matches the ORM models.

## Common commands

```bash
# Apply all migrations
alembic upgrade head

# Create a new autogenerated revision after changing models
alembic revision --autogenerate -m "describe change"

# Roll back one revision
alembic downgrade -1
```

Inside Docker the entrypoint runs `alembic upgrade head` automatically before
starting the bot.
